items.title: Producer Tay Keith Dies at 29

items.title: Sleep Return With Tour, Comic Book, and First New Song in Eight Years
items.summary: The pioneering doom-metal band now includes Void’s Bubba Dupree on guitar and Melvins’ Dale Crover on drums
